title: MD, PhD
biography: Albert Schweitzer was an Alsatian-German physician, theologian, and philosopher who established a hospital in Lambarene, Gabon, dedicating his life to medical care in Africa. Nobel Peace Prize 1952.
aiSummary: Albert Schweitzer is a medicine specialist at Albert Schweitzer Hospital. Based in Lambarene.

timeline.title: Founded Lambarene Hospital
timeline.description: Established a hospital in French Equatorial Africa, treating thousands of patients

timeline.title: Nobel Peace Prize
timeline.description: Awarded for his philosophy of 'Reverence for Life' and humanitarian work
